nodes.label: Tests for the kanban CLI surface (mangaba_cli.kanban).
`mangaba kanban list --session <id>` filters by the originating     chat session
JSON output exposes `session_id` so external clients (Scarf, web     dashboards)
The /kanban specify slash command routes through run_slash, which     both the i
`-h`/`--help` on a subcommand returns the actual help text — see     issue #2179
Bare `/kanban` returns the curated short-help block — not a 5KB     argparse usa
Every documented help alias produces the same curated output.
`/kanban show -h` returns the actual subcommand help, not a     fake `(usage err
Unknown subcommand surfaces a single-line usage error prefixed     with our mark
Missing positional argument shows the subcommand-scoped usage     line, not the
